channel.title: Inventory on Norman Li — Systems, decisions, outcomes
channel.description: Recent content in Inventory on Norman Li — Systems, decisions, outcomes

item.title: Finding the inventory hiding in plain sight
item.description: A practical segmentation model that gives planners a credible, prioritised action queue.

item.title: Three inventory signals I check first
item.description: A compact diagnostic sequence for finding the real source of inventory imbalance.

item.title: Safety stock
item.description: What safety stock is, what it protects against, and where common formulas fail.
